seo.title: DevOps Engineer Salary in India 2026 | Kubernetes Docker Pay
seo.description: DevOps Engineer salary in India for 2026. Breakdown by experience, city, and top companies. Includes AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform specialist pay.
seo.keywords: devops engineer salary india, kubernetes engineer salary india, AWS devops salary india, site reliability engineer salary india 2026
seo.ogDescription: What DevOps engineers earn in India. Complete 2026 salary guide with Kubernetes and cloud breakdown.

hero.title: DevOps Engineer Salary in India (2026)
hero.description: DevOps is one of the highest-paying tech specializations in India, with demand driven by cloud adoption across every industry. Engineers with Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS expertise command exceptional packages.

experience.notes: Entry-level with Docker, CI/CD, and basic cloud knowledge. Linux fundamentals are mandatory.
Kubernetes, Terraform, and cloud platform expertise drive mid-level compensation significantly higher.
Senior engineers who design cloud architectures and lead platform engineering teams.
Principal engineers at product companies managing mission-critical infrastructure.

futureOutlook: DevOps and Platform Engineering salaries in India will grow 25-30% by 2028, driven by cloud-first mandates across BFSI, healthcare, and e-commerce. Engineers with FinOps (cloud cost optimization) skills will earn 20% premiums as companies focus on cloud efficiency.
